title: neotinea tridentata subsp. commutata
intro: Neotinea tridentata subsp. commutata, also known as the rare orchid species, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the genus Neotinea. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Neotinea tridentata subsp. commutata include its ability to promote tissue repair, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
